sections.heading: What is HTTPS & TLS Encryption?
sections.body: SSL certificates, TLS handshakes, and why HTTPS matters. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
HTTPS & TLS Encryption is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind HTTPS & TLS Encryption is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use HTTPS & TLS Encryption every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most HTTPS & TLS Encryption implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding HTTPS & TLS Encryption is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.

summary: HTTPS & TLS Encryption is a core concept in security. SSL certificates, TLS handshakes, and why HTTPS matters. Focus on understanding the fundamentals first, then practice applying them.
